# Rectangle with a rectangular building hole at the centre — baseline
# hole case at 60° stall angle.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0)
(200,150)
(0,150)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,150), area 30000

polygon hole
(80,50)
(120,50)
(120,100)
(80,100)
----
polygon hole 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (80,50)-(120,100), area 2000

set stall-angle=60
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 39
faces: 5 (boundary: 4, interior: 1)
graph: 14 vertices, 17 edges (perimeter: 14, interior: 3)
regions: 1
